content:
# Electrofacies Analysis

**Summary**: A statistical method to group data points into clusters based on similarity.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015]] applied cluster-analysis to categorize well log responses into three distinct electro-facies.

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] performed cluster analysis to analyze how species distribution aligns with environmental changes.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] performed cluster analysis to analyze how species distribution aligns with environmental changes.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The algorithm successfully separated sand, shaly-sand, and shale facies with high correlation to core data. ([[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015, p. 83]])

- The combined analysis... identifies six distinct clusters, reflecting variations in species composition, ecological preferences, and environmental conditions. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 67]])
